leadText: The Peat Block (Japanese: ピートブロック Peat Block) is a type of item introduced in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It allows Ursaring to evolve into Ursaluna.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Ursaring to evolve into Ursaluna when used during a full moon. This consumes the Peat Block.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA S V A block of muddy material that can be used as fuel for burning when it is dried. It’s loved by a certain Pokémon.

sections.title: In the core series games

This consumes the Peat Block. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA S V A block of muddy material that can be used as fuel for burning when it is dried. It’s loved by a certain Pokémon. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods LA Galaxy Hall (reward for completing Request 86: "Gone Astray...in the Icelands") Ginkgo Guild cart (randomly sold by Ginter , as "Hunk of Coal") Sometimes found by Ursaluna Space-time distortions
